title: [WIP] Attach for APIv2
body: Still very early. Does handle both terminal and non-terminal attach, but does not include the Resize endpoint. TODOs litter the code. Compile-tested only, run at your own risk.

comments.body:

@baude I said it'd be ready before end of year. I may have exaggerated the "ready" slightly though.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4766) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
